ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Continued To Apr-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Tullner for and with Ruby Altamirano.

Ms. Altamirano explained personal circumstances and stated that she used the estate funds to survive on. Ms. Tullner explained that she was unable to work with Ms. Altamirano due to lack of cooperation, stated that she is at a loss, that she has done everything she can to further the case, that the $10,000.00 creditor's claim was rejected, that one creditor is owed $1,100.00, that she has filed everything she can and asked the Court to grant her motion to be relieved as counsel. The Court ordered Ms. Altamirano to file a petition that sets forth everything that was brought to the Court's attention with specific amounts and sets forth details (said petition is to be filed by March 24, 2014). Ms. Tullner informed the Court that she is unable to physically appear due to medical issues, stated that she can appear by telephone, that the Brother has a claim on half of the estate, that she does not know what Ms. Altamirano could file to make this go away and that the matter has become unreasonably burdensome. Status on close of the estate was continued to March 24, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Tullner may appear by court call. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To Mar-24-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Mar-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Catherine Tullner for Ruby Altamirano.

Mr. Tullner stated that she was Counsel for Petitioner Ruby Altamirano, that Ms. Altamirano was not present, that she (Counsel) has the petition for final distribution, that the Petitioner will not cooperate or communicate, and that the Petitioner has no interest in concluding the Estate. The Court informed Counsel that a Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is needed. Ms. Tullner stated that she is happy to do that, but that she does not feel that the circumstances or the behavior of her Client will change. Ms. Tullner also stated that she has a corrected Proof of Service that she will file, explained that the New Jersey property was taken care of in the ancilary proceeding in New Jersey which has been completed, that there is no cash or real property in the Estate and that the Executor was presented with a check which is the only asset of the Estate. Status on closing of the estate was continued to March 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel is to have the same hearing date of March 3, 2014. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Ruby Altamirano to appear on March 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
